"'''Doom Mission'''" is a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and illustrated by [[Al Williamson]], originally published from [[January]] to [[April]] [[1983]] by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].

It was republished by [[Dark Horse Comics]] in [[Classic Star Wars 14|''Classic Star Wars'' 14]] and [[Classic Star Wars 15|''Classic Star Wars'' 15]].

The story features the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Vrad Dodonna]]'s desperate attack against [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] newly christened [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].
